EVENT WAS SUNDAY EVENING. CLARIFIES AND ADDS DETAIL TO LSR SENT SUNDAY INDICATING A TIME OF 920 PM 7NE CARBURY. FIRST OF 2 TORNADOES IN THIS LOCATION. ALL DATA IS PRELIMINARY / ESTIMATED, INCLUDING TIMES. 900 PM TO 902 PM. NO DAMAGE FROM THIS FIRST TORNADO.

EVENT WAS SUNDAY EVENING. CLARIFIES AND ADDS DETAIL TO LSR SENT SUNDAY INDICATING A TIME OF 920 PM 7NE CARBURY. SECOND OF 2 TORNADOES IN THIS LOCATION. ALL DATA IS PRELIMINARY / ESTIMATED, INCLUDING TIMES. 905 PM TO 910 PM. THIS PROPERTY AND THE ONE TO THE NORTH OF IT HAD DAMAGE INCLUDING TO A BARN DOOR AND ROOF, MACHINE SHED, SWING SET AND LARGE TREES. PRELIMINARY ESTIMATE IS EF1. END OF PATH / LIFT POINT OF TORNADO NOT YET KNOWN. NO INJURIES AND NO DEATHS IN EITHER TORNADO. NWS THANKS RESIDENTS OF THE AREA FOR SPEAKING WITH US AND FOR THEIR ASSISTANCE.
